name: Form Kiosk (Pi Zero 2 W → sinsera.co/form on the Bravia 75")
description: Light display-only kiosk: a Pi Zero 2 W boots straight to https://sinsera.co/form/ on the Sony Bravia 75" using cage (Wayland kiosk compositor) + cog (WPE WebKit) directly on DRM/KMS — no X, no Chromium (too heavy for the 512MB board). Output forced to 1080p. Standard fixes baked: wizard masked, WiFi country + rfkill-unblock, SSH key + NOPASSWD sudo, 1G swap, locale. WiFi.
notes: UNVERIFIED on hardware. SSH baked so the cage/cog launcher can be tuned live (/usr/local/bin/form-kiosk-launch.sh, log at /var/log/form-kiosk.log).
If cog -P drm fails, fall back to a Wayland platform under cage or surf.
